import org.slf4j.Logger;

// JV003: catch of Throwable / Error must rethrow or carry a marker - capturing is
// not enough, because VirtualMachineError and friends must never be swallowed.
// JV001 is orthogonal: a captured Throwable is clean for JV001 but still JV003.
class ThrowableCatch {
    private final Logger log;

    ThrowableCatch(Logger log) {
        this.log = log;
    }

    void capturedButNotRethrown() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Throwable t) { // want "JV003"
            log.error("broad", t);
        }
    }

    void rethrownIsClean() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Throwable t) {
            throw new RuntimeException(t);
        }
    }

    void errorMustRethrow() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Error err) { // want "JV003"
            log.error("vm", err);
        }
    }

    void markerSuppresses() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Throwable t) {
            // no-report: escalated to the supervisor which re-raises
            log.error("broad", t);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
